title: aster thermalis
intro: Aster thermalis, also known as Tansy or Khampasee, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Aster thermalis include treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
